item.name: Jewel of Plum Spring
item.description:
Thought to be birthed from the gnarled trunk of an ancient plum tree, the blossoms atop this legendary turtle's shell neither wither nor fade with the passage of time.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Wanting nothing more than to swim in the limpid waters it had long admired from afar, a wise old tree of Plum Spring is said to have shaped one of its knots into this flowering turtle. Though the plum blossoms are often submerged when the creature dives, their petals miraculously show no signs of wear.
